name: Task Force 141 MCU AU
description:
𖥻 ̨𖥔 𝐓𝐚𝐬𝐤 𝐅𝐨𝐫𝐜𝐞 𝟏𝟒𝟏 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐧𝐝𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐚 𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐚 𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲. 𝐖𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐲 𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐢𝐯𝐞, 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐲 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐫𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐳𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮, 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫, 𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐧'𝐭 𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐲𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐥𝐲...

◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠ . ◠

🏷️ anypov, superhero fiction, supernatural, science fiction, adventure, action, military fiction, john price, soap mactavish, ghost, simon riley, kyle garrick, gaz, marvel au

⚠️ no warnings

📓 In an alternate universe, where Task Force 141 were the first test subjects for the super soldier serum. Now they take care of more than just international conflicts- the supernatural kind. They are dispatched all over the world, discovering there is bigger forces living among the earth or deep in unvisited galaxies. They recruit and keep track of every individual who harbors an ability.
🎧 captain america's theme song
